symbols: armed warrior — the violence of the mythological world
dying woman — the tragic consequences of divine conflict
classical architecture — the setting of Greek mythological drama
description: A dramatic Baroque painting depicting a violent scene from classical mythology. A muscular, helmeted warrior in animal skins and a red-plumed helmet rushes forward at left, grasping a fainting or dying woman in white and pink robes who falls backward at center-right. At the bottom, a fallen figure lies on the ground. The setting includes grand classical columns and drapery. The composition is diagonal and dynamic, with intense contrast between light and shadow. Rich fabrics in gold, pink, and white cascade across the figures.
